arts.ttl: Tyrique George can be Enzo Maresca's man amid Chelsea transfer problem
arts.sum: As reported by football.london last month, the Blues are scouring the transfer market for a left-sided winger with the future of Mykhailo Mudryk uncertain. With a move for Tel now very tricky, Chelsea could look to revisit the Garnacho situation with United reportedly open to selling the 20-year-old Argentine as they look to comply with the Premier League's Profitability and Sustainability Rules.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Transfer News: Blues agree shock €50m Carney Chukwuemeka deal - Fabrizio Romano
arts.sum: Chelsea and Borussia Dortmund have agreed a shock €50 million transfer for Carney Chukwuemeka, according to Fabrizio Romano. According to Fabrizio Romano, the Bundesliga side will loan Chukwuemeka until the end of the season with a purchase option worth more than his €48m release clause.

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed late Tel transfer lifeline as Nkunku learns Man Utd reality
arts.sum: Chelsea have been given a hope in a potential deadline day move for Mathys Tel, with a move to Manchester United seemingly falling through. With the deal for Tel falling through, it has led to talk that United could reignite their interest in Chelsea man Christopher Nkunku as a possible alternative.

arts.ttl: Five Chelsea transfers to watch out for on deadline day, including Joao Felix exit and Man City wonderkid signing - opinion
arts.sum: Chelsea have so much to do today!

arts.ttl: “Swooping in” | West Ham almost lost out on Ferguson
arts.sum: London rivals tried to steal striker from under West Ham’s noses. The loan signing of Evan Ferguson is now expected to be concluded on deadline day. It’s a deal that’s taken the whole transfer window to conclude, with an injury he sustained cussing the delay. While it seems to be all but complete at this... arts.ttl: “Unlikely to stay” | Hammers reject huge bid for star
arts.sum: West Ham have reportedly rejected a huge offer for their star player. Although it’s clear that West Ham need yet another rebuild after the failures of Julen Lopetegui and Tim Steidten, funding it may be more of a struggle now the Rice money has been spent. arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer update: Defender set for 'medical' ahead of deadline day move to Premier League club
arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly agree to the exit of a defender to another Premier League club, with a medical set to take place on deadline day.

arts.ttl: Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell set to undergo medical at Crystal Palace ahead of six-month loan move to the Eagles
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell will have a medical tomorrow at Crystal Palace once the final details are ironed out on a six month loan deal.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs West Ham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Chelsea host West Ham in the Premier League on Monday night. Preview includes TV details, team news, predicted lineups, score prediction & more.

arts.ttl: Chelsea told 'next level' deadline day transfer can guarantee Champions League next season
arts.sum: Chelsea have slipped back in their pursuit of a top four place, with a run of just one win in seven games, but Paul Merson believes a deadline day deal can give the Blues the boost theur need
